dimensions.label: Surface Model
dimensions.goal: Keep related work in one primary window until a distinct task lifecycle exists.

dimensions.label: Geometry Contract
dimensions.goal: Define default sizes, minimums, snap-safe widths, and explicit reversible modes.

dimensions.label: Placement Contract
dimensions.goal: Use real work-area measurement, remembered normal bounds, and reliable recovery rules.

dimensions.label: Chrome Density
dimensions.goal: Preserve field for the work and keep title bars and support controls subordinate.

dimensions.label: Adaptive Presets
dimensions.goal: Switch modes when minimums do not fit instead of squeezing or overlapping panes.

dimensions.label: Platform Affordances
dimensions.goal: Respect native caption behavior, restore semantics, and platform-specific window expectations.
